title: pelargonium × solubile
intro: Pelargonium × solubile, also known as the Cape Rose or Red Formosa, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Pelargonium. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of rosmarinic acid, which has been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × solubile include relief from cold and flu symptoms, reduced stress and anxiety, and improved respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
